plugins.name: cloudflare-core
plugins.description: Core Cloudflare context: API and docs MCP servers, plus the platform overview skill. Required by most other Cloudflare plugins.

plugins.name: cloudflare-workers
plugins.description: Cloudflare Workers: Wrangler CLI, best practices, bindings, and builds. Depends on cloudflare-core.

plugins.name: cloudflare-observability
plugins.description: Cloudflare Workers Observability: query logs and metrics. Depends on cloudflare-workers.

plugins.name: cloudflare-durable-objects
plugins.description: Cloudflare Durable Objects: stateful coordination. Depends on cloudflare-workers.

plugins.name: cloudflare-agents
plugins.description: Cloudflare Agents SDK for building AI agents on Workers. Includes /build-agent and /build-mcp commands. Depends on cloudflare-workers.

plugins.name: cloudflare-sandbox
plugins.description: Cloudflare Sandbox SDK for secure code execution on Workers. Depends on cloudflare-workers.

plugins.name: cloudflare-email
plugins.description: Cloudflare Email Service: transactional email and routing. Depends on cloudflare-core.

plugins.name: cloudflare-web-perf
plugins.description: Web performance auditing with Chrome DevTools MCP. No Cloudflare dependency.

plugins.name: cloudflare
plugins.description: Umbrella plugin: depends on every other Cloudflare plugin. Install for full developer-platform context; uninstall and install per-product plugins for narrower scope.
